gist.headline: Storyframe Studio joins the garden
gist.blurb: Storyframe Studio just sprouted in our community greenhouse! It's a beautiful open-source creative workspace that uses our API to weave text and images together.
gist.summary: Added Storyframe Studio, an open-source AI creative workspace powered by the Pollinations API, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore Storyframe Studio in the community apps directory for their text and image generation workflows.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about adding 'Storyframe Studio', a creative workspace for writing and images. Visuals should include a cozy writer's desk or studio, storyboards, frames, and writing tools. Polly the bee acting as a writer or artist, perhaps looking at a storyboard with text and images.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, working at a wooden desk with a glowing retro monitor showing storyboards and text. Small pixelated canvases and written pages are pinned to a corkboard nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
